why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:animate must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet-support evidence only, not entity existence, animation semantics, initialized Entity/Level behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test cannot compile because Packet::PlayAnimateClientbound does not exist, and the current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has no official packet id 0x02 animate entry.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
